title: bidens gardneri
intro: Bidens gardneri, also known as Bidens pilosa, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bidens gardneri include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Bidens gardneri is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, and can be consumed as a tea, taken orally as a capsule, or applied topically as a poultice.
